# Tejal APC C1 — Introduction (mini-fixture)

This is a small representative slice of `course-content/courses/tejal-APC-C1/`
used by Story 7a.1's trial-475 regression test. It mirrors the corpus shape
that surfaced the silent gate-bypass on 2026-04-28 (trial 475df528-...).

The body content here is intentionally minimal — the fixture exists to exercise
the directive-composer's on-disk-files walker, not to represent real Tejal
course material. See `tests/parity/test_trial_475_directive_composition_regression.py`.
